abilities.name: Frozen Heart
abilities.description: Immune to Horror Duels and Paralyzed Condition.

abilities.name: From the Shadows
abilities.description: On Initiative, if no enemy aware unfriendly, may take additional turn before Initiative order for each instance.

actions: (1) Frozen Touch (Sorcery/Intellect) | AV: 5t (11t) | TN: 10t | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage, Slow.
(1) Harpoon Gun (Archery) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/4/6 damage, Slow. Ram Pull: Push toward you yards = Might. Capacity 1, Reload 2.
(2) Grim Feast | Devour Living/Undead Minion+ corpse within 1 yard. Gain Well Fed +1 (1 hour) giving +1 Physical (max 4).
system.notes: Fanatical Tyrant December servants. Desperate lowlanders. Embrace cannibalism. Frost magic and harpoons. Allied with Arcanists via Rasputina.
